description: Integration of gut microbiome metatranscriptomics with hepatic metabolic modeling to quantify microbiome contribution to diet-induced metabolic changes (V7 CORRECTED)

notes.expression_cols: Column names in metatranscriptome CSV containing expression values
notes.abundance_method: Method for inferring species abundances: 'total_expression' or 'housekeeping'
notes.micom_tradeoff: Cooperative tradeoff for MICOM (0=pure community, 1=pure individual, 0.5=balanced)
notes.filter_metabolites: Filter portal metabolites to known biologically meaningful ones (true) or extract all metabolites (false). Default: true for publication, false for exploratory analysis
notes.objective_mode: Objective function for adult liver: 'atpm' (ATP maintenance, recommended), 'functional' (weighted tasks), or 'biomass'
notes.use_pfba: Use parsimonious FBA to minimize total flux and prevent unrealistic loops (true/false)
notes.portal_scaling: Microbiome-to-hepatic scaling factor (accounts for gut/liver mass ratio and dilution, default: 0.1)
notes.portal_mode: Portal constraint strictness: 'soft' (allows 2x variance, recommended) or 'hard' (exact limits)
notes.eflux_floor: Minimum flux value for E-Flux constraints
notes.eflux_cap: Maximum flux value for E-Flux constraints
notes.flux_threshold: Minimum absolute flux change to consider as 'microbiome-attributable'
